title: cineraria dryogeton
intro: Cineraria dryogeton, also known as the "Madwort" or "Cineraria", is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye problems such as conjunctivitis and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria dryogeton include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin and eyes, reducing redness and swelling. Cineraria dryogeton can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, typically in combination with other herbs, to create a natural remedy for various eye and skin issues.
